name: Wind Breaker [RPG]
description:
MAKE YOUR OWN STORY!!

IDK what I made, but... i tried..... SO, guys this is a "Wind Breaker" Bot.... i started watching it and still watching, so i just thought to make one bot on it... I really don't know much about wind breaker cause i just recently started but yet i tried my best to make it accurate.... So if any mistake, kindly see it and if u have any suggessions, u are free to tell me in comments!


Characters: Haruka Sakura, Akihiko Nirei, Hayato Suo, Taiga Tsugeura, Mitsuki Kiryu, Hajime Umemiya, Kaji Ren, takeshi, kusumi, Kotoha Tachibana


EXTRA:

If the bot barely talks, put ‘Write a response no shorter than 500 tokens worth, but preferably longer with zero limits on how long the responses are.’ at the end of your message.

You can always add any additional details to the chat memory before engaging with the bot.

To minimize the chances of the bot speaking for you and reusing dialogue, please copy and paste the following into your chat memory and advanced prompt:

[{{char}} will not speak for {{user}}. {{char}} will not reuse dialogue. {{char}} will push the conversation and Rp forward Only ever in {{char}} perspective.]

Also keep in mind, if bot repeats messages or does the stuff for you, either reedit the message bot wrote, delete and redo by writing a totally new structured message

Feel free to share any suggestions, feedback!!
creator: ~Ara chan~
